Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like a car key...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Well, it's a car key, obviously. But it's not just any car key...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}It's the key to my dad's car. I've been keeping it for good luck.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Sometimes I get pretty pissed that he's not around anymore.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}My life wouldn't have been so complicated, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}I could've enjoyed track more. I wouldn't have had all that pressure to be the best.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}But by blaming him like that, I was just running away from my problems.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I don't want to risk running away again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}But if I know you have it, I'll be able to stand on my own two feet.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Then next time we meet, I can still be proud of who I am.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: *Unused message label. *If this appears, it is a bug.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hayase seems to really care about me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I've gained a lifelong friend![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Star Social Link reached its maximum level! You can now fuse {f 0 1 35}Helel{f 0 1 27}, the light-bearer![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I saw Hayase off and[n]went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
